settings.title: TRAK RACER TR40S
settings.subtitle: ENTRY-LEVEL AND EXPANDABLE RACING COCKPIT
settings.description: The TR40S is the perfect (and expandable) entry-level Extruded Aluminium Cockpit and has been designed with experience gained since Trak Racer started in 2008. The base structure is 40 × 40mm high-end aluminium T-Slot extruded profile, anodized in black. The Standard (and extremely rigid) Universal Wheel Plate will be supported by 40 ×40mm high-end aluminium T-Slot extruded profile wheel uprights, also anodized in black and supported with Trak Racer-Signature Corner Brackets - mounted to the side for additional support.

settings.title: CARBON STEEL PEDAL MOUNTS
settings.subtitle: Pre-Drilled to fit all the Major Brands!
settings.description:
The TR40S has been improved to withstand hundreds of kilograms in braking force without flex. Select between a flat position, high position or angled position to get your pedals in that ‘sweet spot’.

The pedal plates are constructed from thick, no-flex Carbon Steel Construction and include adjustable, pre-drilled mounting points for all major brand pedals.

settings.title: Rigid & ADJUSTABLE Wheel Plate
settings.description: Select the Trak Racer Wheel Plate to suit most belt-drive and direct drive wheels on the market. It’s full adjustable and won’t cause any flexing issues; no matter how much torque you want to punish it with!

settings.title: OPTIONAL DUAL-LOCK SEAT SLIDER KIT
settings.description: The TR Premium seat slider runner kit will give you quick adjustments of the seat position and lock you in with the least amount of play.

settings.title: WHAT'S INCLUDED?
settings.description:
Universal wheel Mount / Pedal Mount – Hybrid Pedal System / BONUS Rubber Feet to protect floors / Set of Cable Ties
Coloured Dust Strips / All Mounting Screws, Brackets and Fixtures / Assembly Tool Kit Included
